category_sources: source_facts.description says Contabo Command-Line Interface; official GitHub README says cntb manages Contabo products such as VPS and VDS.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cntb; official GitHub README names the executable and project cntb.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, getting started, examples, shell completion, and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/contabo/cntb, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Contabo CLI; official README describes managing VPS/VDS products and lists CLI/cloud topics.
